tagline: Turn git history into a developer productivity & quality dashboard.
summary: Analyzes git history for a single repo or a workspace of submodules and renders an interactive HTML dashboard: tickets delivered, velocity adjusted for availability, fix-ratio, reverts, WIP vs delivered, utilization, and per-repo specialization, with monthly trends. Repo-agnostic and configurable — no external services, no network.
capabilities: Splits delivered (default branch) from WIP, surviving rebases and cherry-picks
Velocity normalized for availability (weekdays minus configurable holidays and leaves)
Quality signals: fix-ratio, reverts, big commits, lines per commit
Configurable ticket pattern, repos, aliases — works on any repo, no hardcoding
